| date           = 5–15 February 2015

The '''65th''' annual '''[[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' was held from 5 to 15 February 2015, with American film director [[Darren Aronofsky]] as the president of the jury.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hitfix.com/in-contention/darren-aronofsky-will-lead-the-2015-berlin-film-festival-jury |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20141104230524/http://www.hitfix.com/in-contention/darren-aronofsky-will-lead-the-2015-berlin-film-festival-jury |url-status=dead |archive-date=4 November 2014 |title=Darren Aronofsky will lead the 2015 Berlin Film Festival Jury |access-date=4 November 2014 |work=[[HitFix]]}}</ref><ref name="Aronofsky">{{cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_24852.html |title=Darren Aronofsky to be Jury President of the Berlinale 2015 |access-date=4 November 2014 |work=Berlinale |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20141110160223/http://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_24852.html |archive-date=10 November 2014 |url-status=dead  }}</ref> German film director [[Wim Wenders]] was presented with the [[Golden Bear#Golden Bear .E2.80.93 Honorary Award|Honorary Golden Bear]].<ref name="WimWenders">{{cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/hommage/index.html |title=Homage 2015 and Honorary Golden Bear for Wim Wenders |access-date=5 October 2014 |work=berlinale.de |archive-date=5 August 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805183416/https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/hommage/index.html |url-status=dead }}</ref> The first seven films of the festival were announced on 15 December 2014.<ref name="First7">{{cite web | url=https://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/pm_1/65_berlinale/27_PressRelease_Competition_First_Films_15_12_2014.pdf | title=Berlinale 2015: Malick, Dresen, Greenaway and German ''in Competition'' | work=berlinale.de | date=15 December 2014 | access-date=24 December 2014 | archive-date=4 March 2016 | archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304105310/https://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/pm_1/65_berlinale/27_PressRelease_Competition_First_Films_15_12_2014.pdf | url-status=dead }}</ref>

[[Isabel Coixet]]'s ''[[Endless Night (2015 film)|Nobody Wants the Night]]'' was the festival's opening film.<ref>{{cite web | url=https://variety.com/2015/film/news/isabel-coixets-nobody-wants-the-night-to-open-berlin-film-festival-1201396594/ | title=Berlin Film Festival to Open with Juliette Binoche Starrer 'Nobody Wants the Night' | work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]] | publisher=[[Penske Media Corporation]] | date=9 January 2015 | access-date=10 January 2015 | last=Barraclough | first=Leo}}</ref> Iranian docu-drama ''[[Taxi (2015 film)|Taxi]]'', directed by [[Jafar Panahi]], won the [[Golden Bear]], and was the closing film of the festival.<ref name="BBCTaxi">{{cite news |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-31475783 |title=Berlin Film Festival: Panahi's Taxi wins Golden Bear |access-date=15 February 2015 |work=BBC News|date=15 February 2015 }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://m.screendaily.com/5081932.article |title=Berlin 2015: complete competition line-up revealed |access-date=19 February 2015 |work=[[Screen International]]}}</ref>

For the first time in 2015, a ''Berlin Critics' Week'' ran parallel to the official festival. Similar to [[Cannes Film Festival|Cannes]] [[Critics' Week]], the section was a sidebar run by the German Film Critics Association dedicated to independent filmmakers.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hollywoodreporter.com/news/berlin-german-critics-launch-own-763276 |author=Scott Roxborough |website=The Hollywood Reporter |title=Berlin: German Critics Launch Own Critics' Week Sidebar |date=13 January 2015 |access-date=6 February 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=https://variety.com/2015/film/festivals/berlin-film-festival-to-get-its-own-critics-week-1201403764/ |title=Berlin Film Festival to Get its Own Critics' Week |website=Variety |author=Leo Barraclough |access-date=6 February 2016 |date=13 January 2015}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |work=Senses of Cinema |url=http://sensesofcinema.com/2015/feature-articles/the-berlin-critics-week-a-discussion-with-frederic-jaeger-and-dennis-vetter/ |author=Yaron Dahan |title=The Berlin Critic's Week: A Discussion with Frédéric Jaeger and Dennis Vetter |date=March 2015}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://wochederkritik.de/en_US/programmarchiv/wdk2015/ |title=2015 Woche der Kritik |date=2 January 2015 |access-date=7 February 2016}}</ref>

* [[Daniel Brühl]], German actor
* [[Bong Joon-ho]], South Korean director and screenwriter
* [[Martha De Laurentiis]], American film producer
* [[Claudia Llosa]], Peruvian film director, screenwriter and producer
* [[Audrey Tautou]], French actress
* [[Matthew Weiner]], American director, screenwriter and producer

===First Feature Award===
* [[Fernando Eimbcke]], Mexican film director and screenwriter<ref name="JuryFirstFeature">{{Cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_27029.html |title=Jury for the Best First Feature Award |access-date=27 January 2015 |work=Berlinale |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150125113658/http://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_27029.html |archive-date=25 January 2015 |url-status=dead  }}</ref>
* [[Olga Kurylenko]], Ukrainian actress
* [[Joshua Oppenheimer]], American film director

* [[Halil Altındere]], Turkish artist (Turkey)<ref name="JuryShortFilm">{{Cite web |url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/archive/jahresarchive/2015/04_jury_2015/04_jury_2015.html |title=Jury for the Best First Feature Award |access-date=27 January 2015 |work=Berlinale}}</ref>
* [[Madhusree Dutta]], Indian director, curator and author (India)
* Wahyuni A. Hadi, Singaporean author and curator

=== Berlinale Series ===
The Series section, devoted to long-form television series, was introduced in 2015.<ref>{{cite web | title=Berlinale Special & Berlinale Series | website= Berlinale | url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/festival/sections/berlinale-special-and-berlinale-series.html | access-date=11 November 2021}}</ref> ''[[Better Call Saul]]'' had its premiere at the Berlinale.<ref>{{cite web | url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/2015/programme/201501844.html | title=Better Call Saul - Berlinale Special Series 2015 }}</ref>

==Official Awards==
[[File:Jafar Panahi, Cines del Sur 2007.jpg|thumb|The [[Golden Bear]] of 2015 was awarded to ''[[Taxi (2015 film)|Taxi]]'' by Iranian director [[Jafar Panahi]].]]
The following prizes were awarded:

=== Main Competition ===
* [[Golden Bear]]: ''[[Taxi (2015 film)|Taxi]]'' by [[Jafar Panahi]]<ref name="BBCTaxi" />
* [[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize]]: ''[[The Club (2015 film)|The Club]]'' by [[Pablo Larraín]]
* [[Alfred Bauer Prize]]: ''[[Ixcanul]]'' by [[Jayro Bustamante]]
* [[Silver Bear for Best Director]]:
**[[Radu Jude]] for ''[[Aferim!]]''
**[[Małgorzata Szumowska]] for ''[[Body (2015 Polish film)|Body]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]: [[Charlotte Rampling]] for ''[[45 Years]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: [[Tom Courtenay]] for ''[[45 Years]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Screenplay]]: [[Patricio Guzmán]] for ''[[The Pearl Button]]''
* '''Silver Bear for Outstanding Artistic Contribution''': (cinematography)
**[[Sturla Brandth Grøvlen]] for ''[[Victoria (2015 film)|Victoria]]''
**Sergey Mikhalchuk and Evgeniy Privin for ''[[Under Electric Clouds]]''

=== Best First Feature Award ===
* ''[[600 Miles]]'' by [[Gabriel Ripstein]]<ref name="FirstFeature">{{cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/best_first_feature_award/index.html |title=Best First Feature Award, endowed with € 50,000, funded by GWFF |access-date=14 February 2015 | publisher=Berlinale}}</ref>

=== Panorama ===
*'''Audience Award''':
**'''1st Place''': ''[[The Second Mother (2015 film)|The Second Mother]]'' by [[Anna Muylaert]]<ref name="PAA">{{cite web |url=http://www.hollywoodreporter.com/news/berlin-second-mother-wins-panorama-773516 |title=Berlin: 'The Second Mother' Wins Panorama Audience Award |date=14 February 2015 |access-date=14 February 2015 | publisher=Hollywood Reporter}}</ref>
**'''2nd Place''': ''[[Stories of Our Lives]]'' by [[Jim Chuchu]]
**'''3rd Place''': ''[[Tough Love (2015 film)|Tough Love]]'' by [[Rosa von Praunheim]]

=== Generation ===
* [[Dhanak|Rainbow]] by [[Nagesh Kukunoor]]<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.canadastandard.com/index.php/sid/234034207|title='Dhanak' honoured in Poland}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2015/02_programm_2015/02_Filmdatenblatt_2015_201504112.php#tab=video25|title=- Berlinale - Archive - Annual Archives - 2015 - Programme - Dhanak - Rainbow - Regenbogen}}</ref>

== Independent Awards ==

=== [[Teddy Award]] ===
* ''[[Nasty Baby]]'' by [[Sebastián Silva (director)|Sebastián Silva]]<ref>[https://www.faz.net/agenturmeldungen/dpa/nasty-baby-gewinnt-teddy-filmpreis-13428071.html «Nasty Baby» gewinnt Teddy-Filmpreis]. ''[[Frankfurter Allgemeine Zeitung]]'', 14 February 2015.</ref>

=== [[International Federation of Film Critics|FIPRESCI Prize]] ===
* '''Competition''': ''[[Taxi (2015 film)|Taxi]]'' by [[Jafar Panahi]]<ref name="FIPRESCI">{{cite web |url=http://www.fancinema.com.ar/2015/02/berlin-2015-jafar-panahi-gano-el-fipresci-con-taxi/ |title=BERLIN 2015: Jafar Panahi ganó el FIPRESCI con Taxi |access-date=14 February 2015 |work=fancinema |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150924010321/http://www.fancinema.com.ar/2015/02/berlin-2015-jafar-panahi-gano-el-fipresci-con-taxi/ |archive-date=24 September 2015 |url-status=dead  }}</ref>
* '''Panorama''': ''[[A Minor Leap Down]]'' by Hamed Rajabi

==Festival appearance==
The festival poster was designed by ''BOROS agency'', who made the previous four posters of the festival. Festival director [[Dieter Kosslick]] described the poster as "the glamorous and suspense-packed second that precedes every cinema experience is when the curtain opens to reveal the screen. This year's poster motif aims to stir anticipation for that magical moment".<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_25684.html |title=FESTIVAL POSTER FOR THE BERLINALE 2015 |access-date=25 January 2015 |work=berlinale.de |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150218070949/https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_25684.html |archive-date=18 February 2015 |url-status=dead  }}</ref>
